title: ZenStore
description: High-performance MERN e-commerce platform with OTP and Stripe.
longDescription: A sophisticated e-commerce solution featuring secure OTP authentication via Nodemailer, real-time analytics, and a seamless Stripe payment integration for a professional shopping experience.

title: Portfolio
description: Modern, animated personal portfolio website with contact functionality.
longDescription: A fully responsive portfolio website built with React and Tailwind CSS, featuring smooth GSAP animations, SCSS styling, and EmailJS integration for direct messaging. Deployed on Vercel for fast performance.

title: Interactive Gallery
description: Visually stunning image galler with smooth GSAP animations.
longDescription: A high-end visual experience featuring liquid-style transitions, staggered GSAP animations, and a fully responsive grid layout for professional photography showcases.

title: Health Management Dashboard
longDescription: A specialized management tool for healthcare providers to organize patients, appointments, and medical records with a focus on intuitive user interface and data integrity.

title: GSAP Animation Showcase
description: A collection of high-end scroll and micro-animations.
longDescription: Experimentation with advanced animation timelines, scroll-triggered movements, and interactive cursor effects to create immersive web environments using the GSAP library.

title: Editorial Portfolio
longDescription: This very portfolio! Designed with an editorial, architectural aesthetic. It uses Framer Motion for complex animations and a modular React architecture to deliver a high-end personal brand experience.

title: Dairy Farm logistics
description: Specialized tool for farm operations and logistics.
longDescription: Dedicated application for tracking dairy production, livestock health, and logistical data to streamline farm management workflows with a focus on operational efficiency.

title: Modern Shopping UI
description: Sleek frontend for retail and digital storefronts.
longDescription: A pixel-perfect e-commerce frontend focused on high conversion rates, responsive product grids, and an intuitive user journey through clean design.

title: Quiz Master Pro
description: Interactive quiz application with logic-based scoring.
longDescription: A smooth educational tool that handles dynamic questions, timer logic, and detailed result analytics for users. Built with native JavaScript for maximum performance.

title: Precision Stopwatch
description: Sleek time management tool with lap features.
longDescription: A minimalist and accurate digital stopwatch built with clean Vanilla JavaScript logic and a high-contrast dark mode design for professional time tracking.

title: Utility Suite
description: Bundle of precision tools (BMI, Age, Currency).
longDescription: A collection of utility tools including BMI calculators, age trackers, and currency converters, optimized for accuracy and performance using TypeScript.

title: Logic Assignments
description: Exhaustive collection of JS logic and problem solving.
longDescription: A repository containing multiple high-level assignments covering array methods, DOM manipulation, asynchronous patterns, and algorithmic challenges.
